title: iris lactea f. chrysantha
intro: Iris lactea f. chrysantha, also known as the Golden Iris or Yellow Iris, is a flowering plant species within the iris family that is native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory problems, and alleviating pain and swelling, due to its iridoid glycosides and sesquiterpenes content. Herbal preparations of Iris lactea f. chrysantha are often made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
